title: Webhook ingestion endpoint
description: POST /hook/{persona}?key={secret} — key-authenticated endpoint for external systems (CI, CMS). JSON body: content (required), content_type (optional, default text/plain, supports text/markdown via pulldown-cmark), media array (optional, objects with url and description). Fetch media URLs with 30s timeout, 10MB max, image-only validation. Sanitize content with ammonia. Return 401 for bad key, 422 for invalid payload.
close_reason: RSS/Atom poller, webhook endpoint, directory watcher all implemented. Sanitization via ammonia, markdown via pulldown-cmark.
